crystal-trophies:
Crystal Trophies in Bangalore | Premium K9 Optical Crystal Awards

Meru Trophy manufactures and supplies K9-grade optical crystal trophies from our workshop at Gandhinagar, Bangalore, serving corporates, IT companies, MNCs, and educational institutions across Karnataka and pan-India. With 20+ years of experience since 2000, we specialise in clear, flawless K9 crystal awards finished with precision 2D and 3D sub-surface laser engraving.

What are crystal trophies and who buys them?

Crystal trophies are premium recognition awards moulded from optically clear K9 crystal glass. They are the most popular choice for corporate annual day functions, employee recognition, long-service awards, retirement gifts, and dealer/partner appreciation. In Bangalore, our regular buyers include IT parks in Whitefield, Electronic City, and Outer Ring Road, banking firms, hospitals, and large MNCs hosting town halls.

Pricing, sizes and customisation

  • Price range: Rs. 500 to Rs. 5,000+ per piece depending on size, weight, and engraving complexity
  • Sizes: 6 inches to 12 inches; tabletop and podium variants available
  • Bases: black crystal base, wooden base, or metal-fitted base options
  • Customisation: 2D laser engraving for logos and text, 3D internal laser engraving for portraits or building outlines, colour UV printing on request
  • Packaging: individual velvet-lined gift boxes included

Lead time and delivery

Stock crystal trophies ship the same day from Bangalore. Custom-engraved orders typically take 3 to 7 working days, with pan-India courier delivery in 5 to 10 days. Same-day pickup is available at our Gandhinagar showroom. Bulk orders from 10 pieces are welcome; for fully custom moulds the MOQ is 100 pieces.

Order from Meru Trophy

Call +91 7892207252 or +91 7892207252, email merutrophy@gmail.com, or visit our showroom at #273/2, SC Road, 2nd Cross, 1st Floor, Near Annamma Temple, Gandhinagar, Bangalore - 560 009.
medals:
Custom Medals Manufacturer in Bangalore | School, Sports & Marathon Medals

Meru Trophy is a Bangalore-based medal manufacturer and supplier producing zinc alloy, iron, and brass medals for schools, colleges, sports clubs, marathon organisers, and corporate sports events across India. Operating since 2000 from Gandhinagar, Bangalore, we offer in-house die-casting, plating, and ribbon assembly.

Materials, sizes and finishes

  • Materials: zinc alloy (premium detail), iron (budget-friendly), and brass (heavyweight feel)
  • Sizes: 40mm, 50mm, 60mm, 70mm, and 75mm diameter
  • Plating: gold, silver, and bronze finishes with antique or shiny polish
  • Ribbons: tricolour, single colour, and printed sublimation ribbons in 20+ colours

Pricing and minimum order

Medal prices range from Rs. 150 to Rs. 800 per piece depending on size, material, and plating. The MOQ is 10 pieces for stock designs and 100 pieces for fully custom logo die-cast medals. Custom dies are made in-house, making us a cost-effective choice for marathons and tournaments needing 500 to 10,000+ medals.

Who buys our medals?

We supply medals for school annual sports days, inter-college competitions, district and state-level sports meets, marathon and 10K runs, cricket leagues, karate and martial arts tournaments, and corporate fitness events. Government departments and PSUs in Karnataka regularly order from us for state-sponsored events.

Customisation options

Choose laser engraving for names and event details, or full logo die-casting for unique medal faces. UV-printed centres and dome-stickered medals are available for fast turnaround marathons.

Lead time and ordering

Stock medals dispatch within 24 hours; custom die-cast medals take 10 to 15 working days. Pan-India shipping in 5 to 10 days; same-day pickup in Bangalore. Contact +91 7892207252 / +91 7892207252 or merutrophy@gmail.com.
corporate-and-college-premium-trophies:
Corporate & College Premium Trophies Bangalore | Bulk Award Supplier

Meru Trophy is a trusted bulk trophy supplier for corporates, colleges, and government departments across India. From our Gandhinagar, Bangalore manufacturing unit, we deliver premium awards for annual functions, employee recognition programmes, conferences, founder's day celebrations, and college prize distributions. Since 2000, our clientele includes IT corporates, PSUs, banks, engineering colleges, and Karnataka government departments.

Range and pricing

Our premium trophy range spans Rs. 200 to Rs. 5,000+ per piece, combining crystal, metal, acrylic, and wooden elements to suit every budget. Designs include traditional cup trophies, modern crystal columns, plaque-style awards, and statement centrepiece trophies for top honours.

Best suited for

  • Annual day functions at IT companies and MNCs in Bangalore
  • Employee of the Month, Quarter, and Year recognition programmes
  • Conferences, summits, and dealer meets
  • Founder's Day, foundation day, and milestone anniversaries
  • College convocations, prize distributions, and inter-college fests
  • Government and PSU long-service and retirement awards

Customisation and bulk orders

Every trophy is customised with company or institution logo, recipient name, designation, and award category through laser engraving, UV printing, or metal plate fitting. Bulk orders start at 10 pieces for stock designs and 100 pieces for fully custom moulded designs.

Lead time

Custom corporate trophy orders are delivered in 7 to 15 working days. Rush orders for Bangalore clients can be turned around in 3 to 5 days. Pan-India shipping takes 5 to 10 days via reliable couriers.

Get a quote

Share your event date, quantity, and logo with us at merutrophy@gmail.com or call +91 7892207252. Visit our Bangalore showroom near Annamma Temple, SC Road, Gandhinagar - 560 009 to see samples in person.
acrylic-trophies:
Acrylic Trophies in Bangalore | UV-Printed Custom Awards

Meru Trophy designs and manufactures contemporary acrylic trophies with full-colour UV printing and laser engraving from our Bangalore facility. Lightweight, vibrant, and modern, our acrylic awards are the go-to choice for startups, schools, social events, sports leagues, and corporate ESG/CSR programmes.

Why choose acrylic?

Acrylic trophies are lighter than crystal, shatter-resistant, and available in custom shapes that glass cannot match. They allow full-colour photographic printing, making them ideal for brand-forward awards and creative event themes.

Shapes, colours and sizes

  • Shapes: star, shield, plaque, vertical column, hexagon, circle, and custom CNC-cut silhouettes
  • Colours: 20+ acrylic colour options including clear, frosted, gold, rose gold, black, blue, red, and green
  • Sizes: 6 inches to 14 inches
  • Thickness: 5mm to 20mm acrylic sheet

Pricing and MOQ

Acrylic trophies are priced from Rs. 250 to Rs. 1,500 per piece. There is no minimum order quantity for stock designs, so single-piece orders for individual recognition are welcome. Bulk pricing applies from 25 pieces upward.

Customisation

We use UV flatbed printing for vivid full-colour logos and laser engraving for elegant frosted text. Combine both techniques on a single trophy for premium results. Custom CNC-cut shapes can be developed in 5 to 7 days.

Lead time and delivery

Stock acrylic trophies ship same-day from Bangalore. Custom UV-printed orders are ready in 3 to 7 working days, with pan-India delivery in 5 to 10 days.

Contact

Call +91 7892207252, email merutrophy@gmail.com, or visit Meru Trophy at #273/2, SC Road, 2nd Cross, 1st Floor, Gandhinagar, Bangalore - 560 009, Karnataka.
wooden-mementos:
Wooden Mementos & Plaques in Bangalore | Eco-Friendly Awards

Meru Trophy crafts traditional wooden mementos and felicitation plaques in sheesham, rosewood, and teak from our Bangalore workshop. These eco-friendly awards are the preferred choice for temple committees, religious functions, government PSU gifts, formal felicitations, and traditional ceremonies across Karnataka and South India.

Materials and craftsmanship

  • Sheesham wood: rich grain, durable, mid-range pricing
  • Rosewood: deep reddish-brown, premium feel, ideal for VIP felicitations
  • Teak wood: light-toned, long-lasting, weather-resistant
  • Brass / metal plates: fitted with laser or rotary engraving for names, dates, and honours

Why wooden mementos?

Wood carries cultural and ceremonial weight in Indian gifting. It is the natural choice for retirement felicitations, religious trust functions, swami and acharya honours, panchayat and government PSU events, and milestone wedding anniversaries. Wooden mementos are also a sustainable, biodegradable alternative to plastic-heavy trophies.

Pricing and sizes

Wooden mementos are priced from Rs. 400 to Rs. 2,500 per piece. Standard sizes range from 7-inch tabletop plaques to 12-inch ceremonial shields. Custom carving and inlay work are available on request.

Customisation

Each piece is finished with a polished brass or stainless steel plate, laser-engraved with the recipient's name, designation, and the occasion. Logos can be colour-printed on the metal plate using UV printing.

Lead time and ordering

Custom wooden mementos are ready in 5 to 10 working days. Bulk orders for government and trust functions are accommodated from 10 pieces upward. Pan-India shipping in 5 to 10 days; same-day pickup in Bangalore.

Reach us at +91 7892207252 or merutrophy@gmail.com. Showroom: SC Road, Gandhinagar, Bangalore - 560 009.
metal-sports-trophies:
Metal Sports Trophies in Bangalore | Die-Cast Cricket, Football & League Cups

Meru Trophy manufactures die-cast metal sports trophies and figurine cups for cricket, football, basketball, badminton, athletics, and multi-sport tournaments. From our Gandhinagar, Bangalore unit, we supply schools, sports clubs, corporate sports leagues, and tournament organisers across India with durable, weighty metal awards that look the part on the podium.

Sports and figurines available

  • Cricket: batsman figurines, bat-and-ball trophies, World-Cup style cups
  • Football: player figurines, football-on-pillar designs
  • Basketball, volleyball, throwball
  • Badminton, tennis, table tennis
  • Athletics: running figurines, victory-pose trophies
  • Multi-sport / general: classic two-handle cups for any event

Build quality and sizes

Our metal sports trophies use die-cast zinc alloy and pressed metal bodies with multi-tier marble or wooden bases. Sizes range from 8 inches to 36 inches tall, with weights from 300g to 4kg for the largest championship cups. The metal construction ensures these trophies survive years of display and transport.

Pricing and bulk orders

Metal sports trophies are priced from Rs. 300 to Rs. 2,500 per piece. Bulk orders for tournament sets (1st, 2nd, 3rd place plus runner-up) start at 10 pieces. Schools and corporates ordering 50+ pieces receive volume pricing.

Customisation

Add laser-engraved metal plates with the tournament name, year, position, and team or player name. Logo plates can be UV-printed in full colour.

Lead time

Stock metal trophies dispatch same-day from Bangalore. Custom engraved orders take 3 to 7 working days; pan-India shipping in 5 to 10 days. Call +91 7892207252 / +91 7892207252 or email merutrophy@gmail.com.
fibre-trophies:
Fibre Trophies in Bangalore | Lightweight Tournament Awards

Meru Trophy supplies lightweight fibre trophies ideal for large-scale tournaments, school sports days, and bulk events where transport, handling, and vibrant colour matter. Manufactured and stocked at our Gandhinagar, Bangalore facility, our fibre trophies are the most cost-effective bulk option for organisers needing 100+ awards.

Why fibre trophies?

  • Lightweight: easy to ship in bulk and carry across venues
  • Vibrant colours: bright gold, silver, bronze, and multicoloured hand-painted finishes
  • Cost-effective: significantly cheaper than metal or crystal at scale
  • Eye-catching sizes: tall trophies up to 24 inches that look impressive on stage

Sports and designs

Our fibre range includes cricket, football, kabaddi, volleyball, and athletics figurines, plus classic cup-shaped trophies for multi-sport meets. Hand-painted finishes give each piece a premium look at a budget price.

Sizes and pricing

Fibre trophies are available in sizes from 6 inches to 24 inches tall, priced from Rs. 250 to Rs. 1,200 per piece. Tournament sets typically include 6-inch participation trophies up to 24-inch championship trophies for winners.

Who buys fibre trophies?

Schools, colleges, panchayat sports committees, district sports associations, kabaddi and cricket leagues, and corporate sports day organisers all rely on fibre trophies for high-volume, high-impact awards within budget.

Customisation

Add a laser-engraved or UV-printed metal/acrylic plate with the event name, position, and recipient. Bulk orders for tournaments are accommodated from 10 pieces upward.

Lead time and ordering

Stock fibre trophies ship same-day from Bangalore. Custom plate orders are ready in 2 to 5 working days, with pan-India delivery in 5 to 10 days. Contact +91 7892207252, email merutrophy@gmail.com, or visit our showroom at SC Road, Gandhinagar, Bangalore - 560 009, Karnataka.
